header.description: Starts the workflow when HubSpot events occur

company.creation.description: To get notified if any company is created in a customer's account

company.deletion.description: To get notified if any company is deleted in a customer's account

company.propertyChange.description: To get notified if a specified property is changed for any company in a customer's account

contact.creation.description: To get notified if any contact is created in a customer's account

contact.deletion.description: To get notified if any contact is deleted in a customer's account

contact.privacyDeletion.description: To get notified if a contact is deleted for privacy compliance reasons

contact.propertyChange.description: To get notified if a specified property is changed for any contact in a customer's account

conversation.creation.description: To get notified if a new thread is created in an account

conversation.deletion.description: To get notified if a thread is archived or soft-deleted in an account

conversation.newMessage.description: To get notified if a new message on a thread has been received

conversation.privacyDeletion.description: To get notified if a thread is permanently deleted in an account

conversation.propertyChange.description: To get notified if a property on a thread has been changed

deal.creation.description: To get notified if any deal is created in a customer's account

deal.deletion.description: To get notified if any deal is deleted in a customer's account

deal.propertyChange.description: To get notified if a specified property is changed for any deal in a customer's account

ticket.creation.description: To get notified if a ticket is created in a customer's account

ticket.deletion.description: To get notified if any ticket is deleted in a customer's account

ticket.propertyChange.description: To get notified if a specified property is changed for any ticket in a customer's account

property.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression
